verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the bible days, Your children built You a place, And Your glory shone upon them And You showed them Your grace; Well we're living still in Bible days Continuing Your plan, So, we ask You, Lord, to fill this house And bless us once again.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Lord, You said You'd build a temple Not made with hands, And You showed us very clearly Lord, how we fit in that plan; As we dedicate this dwelling place, We dedicate our lives So now all that is within You, Lord Come pour into Your Bride.
